visuals.title: Key Management Basics
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Key Management</text>
  
  <!-- Key Generation -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Generation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Key Storage -->
  <rect x="170" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Storage
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Key Distribution -->
  <rect x="290" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Distribution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Key Rotation -->
  <rect x="110" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Rotation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Key Revocation -->
  <rect x="230" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Revocation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Central Concept -->
  <circle cx="210" y="280" r="40" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <path d="M100 120 Q100 150 160 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M220 120 Q220 150 220 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M340 120 Q340 150 280 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M160 220 Q160 250 210 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280 220 Q280 250 230 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
